testcase.name: test_upload_project_banner_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_project_features.py:63: in test_upload_project_banner_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upload_project_banner_invalid_type
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_project_features.py:83: in test_upload_project_banner_invalid_type assert response.status_code == 400, f"Should reject invalid file type: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Should reject invalid file type: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_retrieve_project_banner_success

skipped.message: Banner upload failed, skipping retrieval test
